case_title: HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SA VS. JOSEPH JACKSON

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SA N FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JACKSON, JOSEPH $748.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $748.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED - SERVED MAY-04-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, JOSEPH
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SA N FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, JOSEPH
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SA N FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, JOSEPH
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SA N FRANCISCO
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, JOSEPH

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SA N FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, JOSEPH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-02-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $43.20 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, JOSEPH

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-02-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-02-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JOSEPH A. QUARTELL-COLLECTIONS SUPERVISOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-02-2013 - JUDGMENT.
